Records.description: Two-loop four-point integral (Nbox split b topology) with 5 internal edges (4 massless, 1 massive with a dot/raised propagator power) across 4 vertices. One external leg is massive. Previously existing pySecDec example used for benchmarking. The name suggests it arises from a split of a nonplanar box topology.
